items.description: Crash on I-476 northbound between 1 miles south of Exit 16A: PA 23/I-76 EAST - PHILADELPHIA/CONSHOHOCKEN and .4 miles south of Exit 16A: PA 23/I-76 EAST - PHILADELPHIA/CONSHOHOCKEN. There is a lane restriction.
